camera_profiles.name: Top Tactical
camera_profiles.purpose: Overhead tactical replay from normalized court coordinates.
camera_profiles.renderer_notes: Best first renderer because Stage 3 homography and Stage 9.1 zones use normalized court coordinates.

camera_profiles.name: Sideline Low
camera_profiles.renderer_notes: Requires ball height estimation that does not exist yet.

camera_profiles.name: Near Baseline
camera_profiles.purpose: Future baseline replay from near player perspective.
camera_profiles.renderer_notes: Renderer hint only; no true near-baseline camera exists.

camera_profiles.name: Far Baseline
camera_profiles.purpose: Future baseline replay from far player perspective.
camera_profiles.renderer_notes: Renderer hint only; player identity is independent of side state.

camera_profiles.name: Audience Side
camera_profiles.renderer_notes: Requires a renderer to map normalized court data into an oblique scene.

camera_profiles.name: Mini Court
camera_profiles.purpose: Compact tactical visualization for reports and UI cards.
camera_profiles.renderer_notes: Can consume replay keyframes and tactical zones immediately.

confidence_reasons: 12 visible expanded ball labels are available.
All visible labels have projected court coordinates and no unknown zones.
Candidate validation distance is low on matched frames (2.797 px average).
All timeline events in the validated timeline are label-supported.
Two main player identities are available from Stage 7.1.
limiting_factors: No major limiting factors detected for this prototype report.
recommended_validation_steps: Proceed to Stage 11 while preserving uncertainty in report wording.

limitations: Tennis has singles and doubles lines; this calibration uses the doubles outer boundary.
Singles and service-box geometry may be derived later.
This is not official line calling.
Hypothesis only; not a confirmed tennis event.
